summary: Iteration 6 verified 3 frontend changes: (1) 'مكتب المدير العام' label rename, (2) removal of 'الموظف' column from weekly/monthly period PDFs, (3) new Department Report feature (/dept-report). Backend regression: 49/49 pytest tests still pass (test_gcaan_backend.py). Frontend (Expo web, 390x844): admin login OK; home role badge shows 'مكتب المدير العام' (verified via inner_text); Profile screen shows 'مكتب المدير العام'; GM home does NOT show 'action-dept-report' (count=0, correctly gated to department_manager role). Reports/weekly + monthly PDF export code (reportExport.ts:78-101) confirmed to output columns [#, نوع النشاط, القسم الذي قام بالنشاط, التاريخ, الحالة] — no 'الموظف' column. New dept-report.tsx has all required testIDs (dept-report-screen, dept-name, export-dept-report, print-dept-report) and calls buildDepartmentReportHtml which produces RTL Arabic PDF titled 'تقرير القسم — <deptName>' with summary stats, employees section, and activities section. Department Manager quick-action 'تقرير القسم' is only present in the department_manager branch of getQuickActions (home.tsx:186-193). No red-screen errors. Only pre-existing shadow* deprecation warnings.

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-web deprecation warning (non-blocking, pre-existing across all iterations).

consistency_observations.issue: Filter chip label at frontend/app/(tabs)/activities.tsx:34 is hardcoded to 'بانتظار المدير' — while the status badge (from STATUS_LABEL) now correctly reads 'بانتظار مكتب المدير العام'. Not a regression from this iteration (chip label was already short-form), but user may want them aligned for consistency. Reference: frontend/app/(tabs)/activities.tsx:34

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update filter chip label in frontend/app/(tabs)/activities.tsx line 34 from 'بانتظار المدير' → 'بانتظار مكتب المدير العام' (or a shorter 'بانتظار المكتب') so the chip and the badge use consistent wording. Non-blocking cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: theme.ts: ROLE_LABEL.general_manager='مكتب المدير العام' and STATUS_LABEL.pending_gm='بانتظار مكتب المدير العام' — both correctly updated (theme.ts:24,33). All UI screens (home.tsx, profile.tsx, activities.tsx cards, approvals, etc.) render via these maps so the rename propagates automatically.

reportExport.ts buildPeriodReportHtml (lines 78-101): row template has 5 cells [i+1, activity_type, employee_department_name, activity_date, status]; thead has 5 columns [#, نوع النشاط, القسم الذي قام بالنشاط, التاريخ, الحالة]. Employee column fully removed as requested.

reportExport.ts buildDepartmentReportHtml (lines 188-239): well-structured Arabic RTL HTML with header, 4-stat summary, employees performance table (name/total/approved/rejected/completion_rate with progress bar), and activities table (#/type/date/status). Title = 'تقرير القسم — <deptName>'.

dept-report.tsx: Correct testIDs (dept-report-screen, dept-name, back-btn, export-dept-report, print-dept-report, per-row emp-row-* and act-row-*). Uses api.get for /departments, /reports/summary, /activities, /reports/completion-rates. Uses STATUS_LABEL/STATUS_COLOR for status badges. Empty states handled.

home.tsx getQuickActions: 'dept-report' action only added inside the department_manager branch (line 189). Employee, division_manager, and general_manager branches do NOT include it — matches requirement.
_layout.tsx: <Stack.Screen name="dept-report" /> declared (line 47) so route /dept-report renders correctly.
No breaking changes to backend — no new endpoints, existing 49 tests all pass.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for verified flows (login, home role badge, profile role badge, GM has no dept-report action, backend regression); PDF column change & dept-report screen verified via source code inspection since HTML output is generated identically to the file contents

seed_data_creation: None — reused existing test seed from prior iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three iteration-6 changes verified. If needed, to test /dept-report end-to-end interactively: (1) login as admin, (2) POST /api/users to create a department_manager assigned to a department, (3) login as that user — home should show quick action with testID 'action-dept-report', tapping navigates to /dept-report which uses testID 'dept-report-screen'. The PDF via 'export-dept-report' invokes exportPdf(buildDepartmentReportHtml(...)) which on web opens a print window. Note the minor cosmetic inconsistency: activities.tsx filter chip line 34 still says 'بانتظار المدير' (not 'بانتظار مكتب المدير العام') — flag if user cares about strict wording alignment.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all three requested changes implemented correctly and verified.
